SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    i_category,
    i_class,
    i_current_price,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS itemrevenue,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) * 100.0 / SUM(SUM(cs_ext_sales_price)) OVER (PARTITION BY i_class) AS revenueratio
FROM 
    catalog_sales
    JOIN item ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    item.i_category IN ('Sports', 'Books', 'Home')
    AND date_dim.d_date BETWEEN '1999-02-2...

SELECT

    i_item_desc,
    i_category,
    i_class,
    i_current_price,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS itemrevenue,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) * 100.0 / SUM(SUM(cs_ext_sales_price)) OVER (PARTITION BY i_class) AS revenueratio
FROM 
    catalog_sales
    INNER JOIN item ON cs_item_sk = i_item_sk
    INNER JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk

    AND d_date >= '1999-02-22'
